name: General Access Control Guidance for Cloud Systems
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: NIST SP 800-210 (2020) provides general access control guidance for cloud systems — covering authentication, authorization, and accountability across IaaS/PaaS/SaaS, with discussion of provider/customer responsibility splits.
relationToCloudSecurity: Direct cloud-IAM guidance. Companion to 800-207 (ZTA) for cloud-specific access control.
relationToAISecurity: Access-control architecture applies to AI services as it does to other cloud services.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).

current_extraction.notes: Metadata-only stub. Source PDF acquisition + extraction is TODO.
